change_summary: Seed the current live Strategy.sol into a fresh retained screen lane.
description: Fresh seed of the live coherent latent-state quote engine for the Apr 07 screen round.
label: baseline

change_summary: Lower the shared floor and move persistent imbalance pricing into a one-sided flow-pressure toxicity state.
decision_summary: delta 12.409851 did not clear promotion margin 18.387450
description: Lower the shared quote floor and add a persistent one-sided flow-pressure toxicity surcharge inside the coherent quote engine.
label: flow-pressure-v1

change_summary: Use persistent flow pressure to gate passive opportunity rebates in addition to one-sided toxicity.
decision_summary: delta 12.409451 did not clear promotion margin 18.387477
description: Keep the lower shared floor and one-sided flow-pressure toxicity overlay, but suppress passive rebates during persistent imbalance.
label: flow-pressure-v2

change_summary: Replace passive-rebate gating with a small common widen in elevated persistent flow-pressure regimes.
decision_summary: delta 12.162664 did not clear promotion margin 18.473693
description: Keep the v18 one-sided flow-pressure toxicity overlay and add only a small common widen when persistent flow pressure is already elevated.
label: flow-pressure-v3

change_summary: Lower the shared floor further and calibrate the one-sided flow-pressure trigger between worker v18 and v19.
decision_summary: delta 12.655424 did not clear promotion margin 18.409422
description: Cheaper resting floor than v18 with a moderately earlier and stronger one-sided flow-pressure toxicity trigger.
label: flow-pressure-v4

change_summary: Reduce shared hazard/divergence carry and increase side-risk multipliers on top of the cheaper flow-toxicity quote surface.
decision_summary: delta 12.604574 did not clear promotion margin 18.504897
description: Reduce shared hazard carry and rely more on side-specific pricing on top of the persistent flow-pressure toxicity overlay.
label: shared-to-side-v1

change_summary: Add a quiet-gap passive recapture memory and apply it only as an extra passive-side opportunity cut.
decision_summary: delta 13.628646 did not clear promotion margin 18.346651
description: Add a quiet-gap passive recapture memory to the cheaper flow-toxicity quote surface.
label: passive-recapture-v1

change_summary: Add a bounded same-side surcharge when persistent flow pressure is elevated to defend against repeat toxic-side streaks.
decision_summary: delta -35.579504 did not clear promotion margin 22.380089
description: Add a bounded same-side persistence surcharge on top of the quiet-gap passive recapture surface.
label: persistence-guard-v1
